description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL that analyzes code on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use an ubuntu-24.04 job with read permissions for actions and contents, and write permission for security events. Perform a CodeQL analysis for C++ code by checking out the repository with submodules, initializing CodeQL, installing dependencies, building the project with CMake and Ninja, and then running the CodeQL analysis.
